Description: Upon activation the unit receives a temporary magic bubble providing protection against one negative effect and increases the unit's damage. If this unit is merged the bubble will be passed on to neighboring units. Destruction of the bubble will yield mana.
Observable Signatures: Unit gains glowing bubble visual on cast; bubble passes to neighbors on merge; mana gained on bubble pop

Description: When a unit receives a bubble it has a certain chance of removing negative effects and destroying the bubble. In addition periodically a unit that receives a negative effect will be cleared of it and receive a bubble. 80-pt bonus: Dispelling or canceling a negative effect with this ability increases the amount of mana received from any source for 10s (triggers once every 40s at most).
Observable Signatures: In Progress

Description: A unit in a bubble will increase its attack speed. 80-pt bonus: Units have a chance of appearing with a bubble but this bubble has reduced duration.
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Stat 5 Total Limit: In Progress

Description: A unit in a bubble will have an increased chance of dealing a critical attack. Critical damage from units in a bubble will be increased.
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.

Description: After activating an ability there is some chance of obtaining a partial restoration of the Hero Ability but this effect will only be able to be activated again after a certain amount of time. (Cooldown: 60%; Chance of charging: 25%; Activation interval: 20s)
Stat 5 Total Limit: Passive recharge visual on hero portrait after ability use

Description: Freezes monsters dealing ability damage and additional damage based on their current health; this health-based damage is reduced for bosses and mini bosses. In PvP mode also freezes enemy units while in Co-Op and single player modes temporarily makes the player's units more powerful. Each unit frozen or empowered gives an Iceshard Charge that increases the damage dealt with the Winter's Kiss ability.
Observable Signatures: Freeze visual on enemy units; Iceshard counter visible on hero; enemy units visibly slowed/stopped

Description: Creates Snowflake tiles on the player's field. When merging units in a Snowflake tile launches a Snowball at a random enemy unit and gives an Iceshard Charge. A unit hit with a Snowball will be frozen by the Winter's Kiss ability. Snowflake tiles are moved at the end of the boss phase and after the ability has been activated.
Observable Signatures: Snowflake tile markers on board; snowball projectile animation on merge

Description: When a boss or mini boss appears there is a chance of all the monsters on the player's path being slowed down. There is a small chance of it being triggered when an ordinary monster appears. After the enemy unit has been frozen its attack speed is temporarily reduced in PvP or increased in Co-Op and single player modes. 80-pt bonus: Monsters slowed with this ability receive increased critical damage.
Stat 1 Name: Chance of slowing a boss or mini boss
Stat 4 Name: Chance of slowing a common monster (80-pt unlock)
Stat 4 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Stat 5 Name: Monster movement slows on boss wave; freeze visual after Winter's Kiss interaction

Description: The Winter's Kiss and Best Served Cold abilities will reduce the monsters' armor. Targets frozen by Winter's Kiss receive additional reduction of their armor. 80-pt bonus: Every time the opponent has one of their units frozen there is a chance of activating monster freezing and the damage against them from the Winter's Kiss.
Stat 4 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Stat 5 Initial Limit: Armor break visual on monsters; chain freeze on opponent units visible at 80+ pts
Stat 5 Total Limit: In Progress

Description: When the ability is activated throws a slug onto the path. The slug dissolves monsters (except bosses and mini bosses) and gives 3 flasks to the player. Merging absorbing or ranking up a unit expends one flask and summons a big jelly into the opponent's path. When the jelly is destroyed it provides mana in proportion to the wave number and splashes slime. When Mari's big summoned jellies are killed a slime charge increases the health of the monsters she summons. 80-pt bonus: On appearing a small monster has a chance to dissolve instantly and summon a small jelly to the enemy's field.
Observable Signatures: Slug projectile on path; jelly summoned to opponent field; flask counter visible

Description: Merging two units has a chance to create a slug unit on the player's field. Instead of merging normally this type of unit increases the rank of a unit it merges with. Can be used with units of maximum rank but the merge rank will not be increased. Each merging of the slug unit grants a slime charge. Slime charges also start increasing the damage dealt by the units on the field.
Stat 1 Name: Chance to spawn a slug unit
Observable Signatures: Slug unit appears on board after merge; slime charge counter increases

Description: When a boss mini boss or phantom appears covers them with slime linking them with nearby monsters. When the monster affected with slime dies links nearby monsters again. A portion of the damage received by a linked monster is transferred to the other linked monsters. Expending a flask or merging a slug unit links the frontmost unlinked monsters together. Linked monsters have their armor reduced.
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Stat 5 Total Limit: Slime link visual between monsters; damage transfer indicator; armor bar reduced on linked targets

Description: Phantoms and any monsters summoned to the opponent's field gain a slime shield that reduces the damage they receive (in PvP mode) or increases it (in other modes). 80-pt bonus: Monsters linked with the Unstable Connection ability receive increased critical damage.

Description: Creates a Lich on the path. This Lich moves with the first monster and deals area damage.
